title: Raid on Thyferran Convoy Delta-Two-Niner

In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], the rogue [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] '''raided''' [[Thyferran Convoy Delta-Two-Niner]] in the [[Chorax system/Legends|Chorax system]], kicking off the [[Bacta War]] between Rogue Squadron and the [[Xucphra Corporation]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]].

==Background==
Having collectively resigned their commissions in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]], Rogue Squadron waged a campaign for several months to undermine Isard's rule, remove her monopoly on [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]], and free the prisoners held on the ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]''.

==The battle==
The first operation of this campaign was intended to force Ysanne Isard to devote some of her resources to safeguarding future bacta convoys. [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] ambushed the [[Thyferran Convoy Delta-Two-Niner]] in the [[Chorax]] system. After a brief combat with its escort, the convoy surrendered and accepted to use its cargo to make delivery runs for the Rogues.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Bacta War (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
